title: Fıstık Ağacı — basement retaining wall (REJECT)
description: Pre-recorded 9-agent debate from a real Fıstık Ağacı site photo. Replays deterministically without spending Kimi quota — perfect for the demo video where agent latency variance breaks the cut.

events.content: Stage: foundation. Inspection started for Shear Wall P1 (basement_2). 9 agents online — Kimi K2.6 vision, Hermes 4 70B reasoning.
Project metadata: Istanbul, soil ZC, 6 floors + 2 basements, earthquake zone Zone 1 (highest).
Kimi K2.6 detection: 20 vertical rebars on retaining wall, stirrups not visible (occluded by formwork shadows).
Plan vs site: spec requires 30 vertical bars at Ø12; site shows 20. Missing 10 bars (33% deficit) → critical.
TBDY 7.6.2.1 violated: shear-wall vertical reinforcement ratio falls below 0.0025·Ag minimum. TS 500 7.4.4 confinement spacing not verifiable from this photo.
EXIF 2026-04-25T08:14 UTC, GPS 41.0082N 28.9784E matches project coordinates. No reference marker — measurements unverified.
AFAD zone 1 + soil ZC + 6 floors → seismic risk multiplier 1.42×. Vertical-rebar deficit on a basement retaining wall = catastrophic failure mode.
Kimi K2.6 close-up: visible rib pattern consistent with B500C (S420). No active corrosion. Surface clean.
Kimi K2.6 cover estimate: ≈18mm at bottom-left edge — TS 500 minimum 25mm violated; in earth-contact zones spec is 50mm.

VERDICT: REJECT. Composite score 38/100. Three critical findings stack: 33% rebar deficit (TBDY 7.6.2.1) + cover 18mm vs 50mm earth-contact spec (TS 500 7.3) + missing reference marker (FraudAgent). Pour blocked. Re-bind 10 vertical Ø12 bars, install plastic spacers on the earth face, re-photograph with a tape measure in frame, re-run inspection.

evidence.narrative_en_literary: Ten vertical bars are missing from this retaining wall, and the concrete cover at the earth face measures roughly 18 millimetres where the code requires fifty. In a Zone 1 soil-class ZC parcel, that combination is what fails first when the ground moves. Stop the pour, re-bind the cage, and have a licensed engineer countersign before any concrete is delivered.
evidence.narrative_tr_literary: Bu istinat duvarında on adet düşey donatı eksik ve toprakla temas eden yüzde paspayı 18 mm civarında — yönetmelik 50 mm istiyor. Birinci derece deprem bölgesinde, ZC zemin sınıfında bu kombinasyon, deprem geldiğinde önce kırılan noktadır. Beton dökümünü durdurun, kafesi yeniden bağlayın, lisanslı bir mühendis imzası olmadan kamyon sahaya gelmesin.
critical_issues: 10 vertical rebars missing from retaining wall P1
No reference marker — measurements not legally verifiable
recommendations: Re-bind 10 × Ø12 verticals at the spacing shown in S-04 sheet
Install plastic spacers on the earth-facing rebar plane
Re-photograph with a tape measure visible in the frame
Halt the pour until municipal engineer countersigns

events.content: Belediye Agent (Hermes 4 70B): independent review confirms REJECT. Deficiencies are structural and on the seismic load path — cannot downgrade to CONDITIONAL. Escalating to human municipal engineer for countersignature before any pour authorisation.

evidence.reasoning: Critical findings on seismic load path; safety rail prevents uphold of REJECT verdicts.
